name: Core Privacy Domain Contracts
purpose: Define the shared privacy vocabulary used by memory controls, private mode, sensitive locks, export, destructive action boundaries, Carnos permissions, external connectors, and Spotify.

schema_requirement.reason: 20B defines contract enums, state models, validation rules, and compatibility boundaries. It does not create or modify tables, migrations, RLS, token storage, export rows, or connector rows.
schema_requirement.future_schema_gate: When a later chunk creates or modifies tables, migrations, RLS policies, or token storage boundaries, schema must be inspected or provided before coding.

privacy_levels.label: Public
privacy_levels.meaning: Safe to show in normal app surfaces when the user chooses to expose it.

privacy_levels.label: Internal
privacy_levels.meaning: Normal personal app data that can appear inside ascendOS but should not be externally exposed without user action.

privacy_levels.label: Private
privacy_levels.meaning: Personal data that needs explicit privacy handling and should be restricted during Private Mode.

privacy_levels.label: Sensitive
privacy_levels.meaning: Data that can reveal health, finance, personal reflections, private goals, documents, connector activity, or listening behavior.

privacy_levels.label: Locked
privacy_levels.meaning: Data blocked from broad UI, Carnos context, analytics, export, and connector use unless the user explicitly unlocks or approves a narrow action.

sensitivity_levels.meaning: Personal but not highly sensitive data.
Health, finance, identity-adjacent, private reflection, document, connector, Spotify history, or high-trust data.
Data that should normally be hidden from dashboards, analytics, broad Carnos context, exports, and connector actions.

lock_states.dashboard_behavior: normal allowed surfaces can show the item
lock_states.carnos_behavior: Carnos may use the item if permission allows
lock_states.export_behavior: export allowed if privacy level allows

lock_states.dashboard_behavior: show review-required state before broad exposure
lock_states.carnos_behavior: Carnos may not use without review
lock_states.export_behavior: export preview must flag review requirement

lock_states.dashboard_behavior: hide from broad dashboard cards and timeline surfaces
lock_states.carnos_behavior: Carnos may use only if separate permission allows
lock_states.export_behavior: export preview must show hidden status

lock_states.dashboard_behavior: user-facing UI may show with badge
lock_states.carnos_behavior: Carnos cannot read, summarize, remember, or use in context
lock_states.export_behavior: export requires explicit user approval if sensitive

lock_states.dashboard_behavior: hide from broad surfaces and show only locked metadata where safe
lock_states.export_behavior: export blocked by default and requires explicit review

redaction_levels.display: show complete value only where allowed
show safe summary without full details
do not show in normal surfaces

validation_rules: Every privacy-controlled item must have privacy_level.
Every privacy-controlled item must have sensitivity_level.
Every privacy-controlled item must have lock_state.
Every privacy-controlled item must have redaction_level.
Every high-risk action must have action_status.
Every Carnos permission decision must identify the actor and domain.
Every connector or Spotify action must pass private mode and lock checks.
Every sensitive export preview must include redaction and warning metadata.
Every destructive action boundary must require review and audit.
Every privacy state transition must record whether review and audit are required.
connector_and_spotify_compatibility: connector token boundary must not expose raw tokens
connector action request must use action_status
connector action must respect Private Mode
Spotify account connection must require user OAuth
Spotify token access by Carnos is blocked
Spotify action proposal must use action_status
Spotify recently played data defaults to sensitive
Spotify playback control requires permission review
must_not_do: do not invent live database schema in 20B
do not implement runtime Spotify OAuth in 20B
do not implement connector token storage in 20B
do not implement destructive action execution in 20B
do not allow Carnos to bypass privacy states
acceptance: Connector and Spotify compatibility markers are defined.
